nasb.text: So the sons of Israel gave the Levites from their inheritance these cities with their pasture lands, according to the command of the Lord.

esv.text: So by command of the Lord the people of Israel gave to the Levites the following cities and pasturelands out of their inheritance.

cnv.text: 於是以色列人照著耶和華所吩咐的，從自己的產業中，把以下這些城市和城的郊野，給了利未人。

ccb.text: 以色列人便按照耶和华的吩咐，从他们的产业中把以下的城邑及城郊分给了利未人。
